content.en:
For Ye Tian, the most important thing at the moment is to obtain information about the land of the Eternal Shore.

Thereupon.

He stayed in the Eternal Ancient Demon City and kept asking for information.

And.

He also inquired about the resources that would help him refine his immeasurable bones.

Now, the effect of his primeval source liquid on him was very weak, although it was still somewhat useful, but it was almost impossible to complete the five bone transformations of the immeasurable bones in his body.

Thus.

He wanted to find other resources in the land of Eternity to refine the Immeasurable Bone in his place.

It didn't take long for him to inquire about a resource that was more common in the land of eternity—the golden water of the other side.

The golden water on the other side can refine immeasurable bones, and the effect is very good.

Of course, there are other treasures that can refine his immeasurable bones, but the easiest to obtain is the golden water on the other side.

For example, in the Eternal Ancient Demon City, you can buy gold water on the other side, but the price is expensive.

A bottle of gold water from the other side required 100,000 primary-grade eternal ancient gold, which was a high price that he couldn't even afford now.

"I can't afford to buy the gold water on the other side in the Eternal Ancient Demon City, I can't afford it at all! Many of my resources are relatively average, and I can't sell much Eternal Ancient Gold if I sell them!" Ye Tian thought so.

He felt that he still inquired about the birthplace of Jinshui on the other side, and found a way to plan it himself.

Gradually, Ye Tian learned more about the land on the other side of eternity, and also knew the origin of the golden water on the other side.

"The ancient well on the other side!"

This is a special kind of treasure land in the land of the other side of eternity, which randomly appears in any place on the land of the other side, and an ancient well on the other side can give birth to some gold water on the other side.

Therefore, many forces have occupied some ancient wells on the other side, relying on the ancient wells on the other side to obtain some gold water on the other side.

"The ancient wells on the other side of the eternal land must have owners, even if I really find an ownerless ancient well on the other side, I can't wait for the ancient well on the other side to give birth to the golden water on the other side. "

Ye Tian thought.

Therefore, he was ready to snatch the golden water on the other side of the ancient well.

"The golden water on the other side is very helpful to the cultivators, so the ancient wells on the other side occupied by the cultivators have almost no golden water on the other side. However, the gold water on the other side is not very helpful to the blood transformation realm race, and the forces that sell the gold water on the other side are all from the blood transformation realm race. "

Of course.

Ye Tian's most suitable target was the Eternal True Beast Clan.

He was ready to snatch the golden water from the other side of the Eternal True Beast Clan.

Like the Eternal True Beast Clan, the demand for gold water on the other side is not high, and they will not take it out for trading.

Therefore, if the Eternal True Beast Clan occupied the ancient well on the other side, it was very likely that they would still have a large amount of gold water on the other side.

So, in the following days, Ye Tian mainly inquired about which Eternal True Beast clan owned the ancient well on the other side.

"Eternal Blood Birds!"

Ye Tian learned that this Eternal True Beast Clan owned the ancient well on the other side.

Moreover, the Eternal Blood Bird Clan belonged to the huge Eternal True Beast Race in this territory, and its strength was extremely terrifying.

Furthermore, once killed, the Eternal Blood Bird leaves a mark.

Thus.

They didn't dare to provoke the Eternal Blood Birds.

Previously, Ye Tian had also severely injured an Eternal Blood Bird, and he had not killed the other party.

"The Eternal Blood Bird Clan has a lot of ancient wells on the other side, so let's attack them!" Ye Tian decided.

......

The land of eternity.

Ye Tian looked around for the traces of the Eternal Blood Bird, he was going to kill one of the Eternal Blood Birds of the Fourth Bone Transformation Realm, and then copy the body of the Eternal Blood Bird, so that he could blend into the Eternal Blood Bird clan!

Otherwise, he will copy it casually, but if he doesn't kill the other party, it will be easy to expose.

There are still a lot of Eternal Blood Birds in this territory, so after only looking for a while, he came across an Eternal Blood Bird, and it happened to be an Eternal Blood Bird of the Fourth Bone Transformation Realm.

"Four bone transformations, you can kill instantly, first copy the opponent's body, and then kill instantly, so that you can directly replace it. "

"After killing the other party, my copy body will be annihilated directly, and it will not leave a mark. In this way, the Eternal Blood Bird Clan will not be able to sense the imprint, so naturally they will not come. "

Soon.

Ye Tian successfully copied a four-time bone transformation realm eternal blood bird to copy the body.

"Do it!"

He struck out in an instant, using the Ancient God Demon Spear to directly penetrate the body of the Eternal Blood Bird.

Bang!

This Eternal Blood Bird was killed in one blow and had no power to resist at all.

After all, Ye Tian's current combat power was between the sixth bone transformation realm and the seventh bone transformation realm, and it was naturally not difficult to kill an eternal blood bird with four bone transformation realms.

After killing this Eternal Blood Bird, a ray of light shot out, and it seemed to stay on Ye Tian's body.

But.

Ye Tian directly annihilated his body, and this light dissipated.

"That's it!"

Ye Tian then took the identity of this Eternal Blood Bird's duplicate body, in the nest of the Eternal Blood Bird near the front.

After some time, he finally found the Eternal Blood Bird's nest.

Subsequently.

He blended in with the Eternal Blood Birds.

......

"So many Eternal Blood Birds!"

Ye Tian entered the nest of the Eternal Blood Bird Clan, and was really shocked.

It is said to be a nest, but it is actually similar to a piece of heaven and earth, this nest is like a huge world, and there are countless holes inside the nest, and each hole is a piece of heaven and earth.

Through the breath of the Eternal Blood Bird, Ye Tian quickly found the hole that belonged to this body, and then flew in.

In the years that followed, he continued to learn about this Eternal Blood Bird Clan, and tried to find out the existence of the ancient well on the other side.

The Eternal Blood Bird's intelligence is not high, but simple communication can still be done.

Through continuous understanding, he finally knew the location of an ancient well on the other side of the Eternal Blood Bird Clan.

Swish!

Ye Tian kept shuttling, and it took a little time to come to a place.

"This is it!"

Ye Tian came to an area, where there was an endless mountain range, just across the void of the land on the other side of eternity.

At this time, many Eternal Blood Birds are staying here.

Inside this mountain range, there is an ancient well on the other side, which belongs to the Eternal Blood Bird clan.

And the strongest Eternal Blood Bird sitting here is an Eternal Blood Bird that has changed seven times.

In terms of strength, Ye Tian was not the opponent of this Eternal Blood Bird.

Although the Eternal Blood Bird doesn't value the golden water on the other side, it won't be swallowed by ordinary Eternal Blood Birds!

After all, if there are enough gold water on the other side, they can still improve their strength or repair the foundation of their injuries.

When Ye Tian approached the ancient well on the other side, the Eternal Blood Bird of the Seven Blood Transformation Realm lying on the edge of the ancient well on the other side looked over and passed on a set of messages.

"Leave!"

It's a drive!

Obviously, it doesn't allow ordinary people to come here.
